description:
To properly set the group owner of /var/log/lastlog, run the command: 
$ sudo chgrp utmp /var/log/lastlog
or 
$ sudo chgrp root /var/log/lastlog
rationale:
The <tt>/var/log/lastlog</tt> file contains logs of reports the most recent login of all users
and should only be accessed by authorized personnel.
ocil_clause:
/var/log/lastlog does not have a group owner of
utmp or
root
ocil:
To check the group ownership of /var/log/lastlog, run the command: 
$ ls -lL /var/log/lastlog
If properly configured, the output should indicate the following group-owner: utmp or root
title: Verify Group Who Owns /var/log/lastlog File
